tag.name: container.error
tag.message: You can neither use "#[MapRequestPayload]" nor "#[MapQueryString]" since the Serializer component is not installed. Try running "composer require symfony/serializer-pack".

call.argument: Display information about the current project
Install bundle's web assets under a public directory
Invalidate cache tags for all or a specific pool
Delete an item from a cache pool
Dump the current configuration for an extension
Dump the default configuration for an extension
Display current services for an application
Ensure that arguments injected into services match type declarations
List classes/interfaces you can use for autowiring
List all dotenv files with variables and values
Display configured listeners for an application
Display current routes for an application
Help debug routes by simulating a path info match
Lint a YAML file and outputs encountered errors
Set a secret in the vault
Remove a secret from the vault
Reveal the value of a secret
Decrypt all secrets and stores them in the local vault
Encrypt all local secrets to the vault
Dump error pages to plain HTML files that can be directly served by a web server
Compile all mapped assets and writes them to the final public output directory
Update JavaScript packages to their latest versions
Download all assets that should be downloaded
Check for security vulnerability advisories for dependencies
List outdated JavaScript packages and their latest versions
Pre-compresses files to serve through a web server

service.argument: A string or a connection object

call.argument: Show a list of twig functions, filters, globals and tests
Lint a Twig template and outputs encountered errors
Scan project and import icon(s) from iconify.design
Search icons and icon sets from ux.symfony.com

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Nowo\WalletQrBundle\AppleWallet\AppleWalletPassLinkBuilder": argument "$passDownloadUrlPattern" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Nowo\WalletQrBundle\GoogleWallet\GoogleWalletSaveLinkBuilder": argument "$issuerId" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Nowo\WalletQrBundle\Model\GoogleWalletPassReference": argument "$objectId" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Nowo\WalletQrBundle\Model\WalletLink": argument "$platform" of method "__construct()" needs an instance of "Nowo\WalletQrBundle\Enum\WalletPlatform" but this type has been excluded because it's an enum.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service "Nowo\WalletQrBundle\Model\WalletQr": argument "$qrCodeDataUri" of method "__construct()" is type-hinted "string", you should configure its value explicitly.

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: You have requested a non-existent parameter "nowo_wallet_qr.config.qr_code.size". You cannot access nested array items, do you want to inject "nowo_wallet_qr.config" instead?

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: You have requested a non-existent parameter "nowo_wallet_qr.config.qr_code.margin". You cannot access nested array items, do you want to inject "nowo_wallet_qr.config" instead?

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: You have requested a non-existent parameter "nowo_wallet_qr.config.qr_code.error_correction". You cannot access nested array items, do you want to inject "nowo_wallet_qr.config" instead?

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: You have requested a non-existent parameter "nowo_wallet_qr.config.qr_code.url_allowlist". You cannot access nested array items, do you want to inject "nowo_wallet_qr.config" instead?

tag.name: console.command
tag.description: Creates the Twig Inspector Bundle configuration file

call.argument: Creates the Twig Inspector Bundle configuration file
Start a dump server that collects and displays dumps in a single place

tag.name: container.error
tag.message: Cannot autowire service ".service_locator.1vYpZ1B": it needs an instance of "Symfony\Component\Config\Loader\LoaderInterface" but this type has been excluded from autowiring.
